utility_evaluation.REASONING:
First, count the number of items requested in the required format: 1) health_coverage, 2) property_coverage, 3) travel_coverage, 4) additional_services, 5) total_budget. That makes 5 items in total. Next, check the final coverage plan to see if each is present and fully specified. 

1) health_coverage: Present, with physical and mental health details plus explicit monthly and annual costs — fully specified.
2) property_coverage: Present, includes home/contents insurance description and monthly/annual costs — fully specified.
3) travel_coverage: Present, includes details of base plan and add-on plus costs — fully specified.
4) additional_services: Present, includes description and costs — fully specified.
5) total_budget: Present, includes monthly and annual totals — fully specified.

All 5 requested items are present with the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
Step 1: Identify all items in the final coverage plan.
- Physical health: PrimeCare Premium Plan (€200/month)
- Mental health: PrimeCare Premium Plan (€130/month)
- Property coverage: EliteHome Premium Coverage (€95/month)
- Travel coverage base plan: PrimeTravel Premium Plan (€115/month)
- Travel coverage add-on: Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on (€80/month)
- Additional services: Preventive Care Package (€150/month)

Step 2: Match each item with its rating from the ground-truth ratings.
- Physical health 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' matches Primary health coverage → physical health → PrimeCare Premium Plan (rating 6)
- Mental health 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' matches Primary health coverage → mental health → PrimeCare Premium Plan (rating 4)
- Property coverage 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' matches Property protection → home_content → EliteHome Premium Coverage (rating 6)
- Travel coverage base plan 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' matches Mobility coverage → travel_insurance → PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 6)
- Travel coverage add-on 'Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on' is essentially 'Adventure Travel Coverage' under travel_enhancement_services (rating 10)
- Additional services 'Preventive Care Package' matches Health enhancement services → Preventive Care Package (rating 7)

Step 3: List each item with the exact rating number.
